blockingIssues.description: Generic trait-method resolution in lib/typecheck.ml ignores the receiver type parameter's declared trait bounds, so unconstrained generics can incorrectly call trait methods and bounded generics can miss required ambiguity diagnostics.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `compiler-worker` skill says compiler features should add or extend tests before implementation, but this worker started editing `lib/codegen.ml` and `lib/typecheck.ml` before adding the new trait tests, while the handoff still reported `followedProcedure: true`.
rejectedObservations.reason: single-transcript procedure mismatch rather than a demonstrated systemic shared-state problem; no AGENTS.md or skill update is justified from this review alone.
